response.step_by_step_log: 1. Analyzed video, identifying the vocal performance of 'GREATEST' by Otonose Kanade. 2. Performed a search for 'GREATEST' by Otonose Kanade to get official metadata and lyrics. 3. Used UtaTen to retrieve the full lyrics in the original Japanese. 4. Translated the lyrics into English. 5. Divided the video into two scenes based on the presence of vocal music: 00:00-04:47 (Vocal performance) and 04:47-05:01 (Outro).
response.global_summary: The video is a promotional performance featuring Otonose Kanade's song 'GREATEST' from her birthday live 2026. The video consists of a static image throughout the performance, followed by a short space-themed animation at the end.

scenes.description: The video displays a static image of 'Otonose Kanade IN PROGRESS BIRTHDAY LIVE 2026' for the duration of the song 'GREATEST'. Vocal music is playing.

scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Open your eyes, hum a tune, you'll shine "Surely I'll become invincible"
Feel my heart
See me become the GREATEST
No one can beat me
Cuz I'm a GREATEST
The shoelaces I tied tightly again look like wings, I have a feeling I can jump anywhere
I'm not into chasing
Let's overtake, tomorrow isn't sleepy enough to end as a dream
Yes, everything will be alright
I'll win more boldly than a miracle
Even scenery I've never seen will be filled with light
Wanna be the GREATEST
If it's a map, there's a gushing heat in this chest
No one can stop my way
Wanna be the GREATEST
Even weak words become a symphony if layered
You can become strong, sing
(Feel my heart)
"Surely I'll become invincible"
(Feel my light)
Remember the stage I drew alone in my room, it becomes a place where I belong
I can hear the voice
Taking a deep breath and jumping on is the best method, dancing with my chest out is not bad either
Don't be afraid, it's alright
Every time you chant it, it becomes "absolute"
Even if it's a life only once, take the helm with these hands
Wanna be the GREATEST
I go on the path where I can shine as myself
My voice also sparkles, my day
Wanna be the GREATEST
Play the overture to awaken
It comes true as much as I wish
(Feel my heart)
It becomes more wonderful
(Feel my light)
Feel my heart
See me become the GREATEST
No one can beat me
Cuz I'm a GREATEST
Wanna be the GREATEST
There's a reason to look up for the number of "likes" I gave up on
Tears, guide my beat
Wanna be the GREATEST
Bring the scars too, allegro
You can become strong, sing
(Feel my heart)
Towards the side where more light shines
(Feel my light)
(Feel my heart)
"Surely I'll become invincible"
(Feel my light)

scenes.description: The image transitions to a space-themed animation with a glowing star. No vocal music is present.
